description_long: This object is a rectangular, box-like electronic device with a matte black exterior. It features a flat top surface with a small control panel area that includes two colored buttons (green and red) and a gray rectangular section, likely a display or label. On one side, there are two pull-out trays or drawers, suggesting it may be a device for processing or dispensing items, such as a document scanner, printer, or cash drawer. The overall design is utilitarian, with sharp edges and a robust, industrial appearance. The trays appear to be made of the same material as the main body, and the control panel is slightly recessed. The object is compact and would fit comfortably on a desk or countertop in an urban environment.
description: A matte black rectangular electronic device with a control panel and two pull-out trays, likely used for processing or dispensing items. It has a robust, utilitarian design suitable for desktop or countertop placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat face of the device with the control panel visible on top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing two pull-out trays extending from the right side of the device.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the trays fully extended and the control panel on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the trays partially extended from the left side.
